name: convert_format
description: Convert an image to a different output format. Use 'auto' to let imgix choose the optimal format (WebP, AVIF) based on the client's Accept header for the best compression.

parameters.name: fm
parameters.description: Output format: jpg, png, webp, avif, gif, jp2, json, mp4, blurhash. Use 'auto' to auto-detect.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Compression quality (0-100). Lower values produce smaller files.

parameters.name: lossless
parameters.description: Enable lossless compression for WebP or AVIF.

parameters.name: cs
parameters.description: Color space: srgb, adobergb1998, tinysrgb, strip.

body.note: Returns the image converted to WebP format. Content-Type: image/webp. File size is typically 25-35% smaller than JPEG at equivalent quality.
